title: Castle - exaroton Parkour Challenge
description: Parkour Map/Modpack "Castle" built by the exaroton Team for Gamescom 2024
body:
![exaroton Parkour Challenge - Map #1 - Castle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b87cd6a0ac3117b23147a2f47de0e2f7e26544d0.png)

View on CurseForge 🢅

### exaroton Parkour Challenge This parkour map was originally built for our booth at Gamescom 2024 in Cologne, where it was part of a daily competition across five different maps. Each day, players raced against the clock for the best times and the chance to win prizes. Now that Gamescom is over, we're excited to release this map for everyone to try. ![Pictures from the exaroton booth at Gamescom 2024](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0271fd735aa22230389f5beed100a360a2a60a67.png) Whether you're new to parkour or a seasoned player, this map has something for you. Beginners can enjoy exploring the world and learning the ropes, while experienced players can push their skills to the limit, aiming for the fastest completion times. It’s a solo challenge, but you can compare times with friends to see who comes out on top. Give it a go and see how fast you can finish!
### Map #1: Castle ![Screenshots of the parkour challenge map](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5654c8e41485a25c96185d288fd0fab23a220221.png) Set inside a vast castle, your goal is to escape from the castle prison by navigating through intricate rooms, hidden passages, and challenging obstacles. The map features custom decorations and modded elements that add depth to the environment, with the Create mod providing moving contraptions and dynamic mechanics to enhance the challenge and atmosphere. [![Advertisment banner exaroton.com](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/160e1e05d374f48c2b0671f53f0d4f8b60a93506.png)](https://exaroton.com?utm_source=parkour&utm_medium=modrinth&utm_campaign=gamescom2024&utm_content=castle) ## Credits Our parkour challenge maps were built using the following mods/tools: _Note: Not all mods are included in this modpack, some were only used for building, and some are not used for every map._ ### General - [Minecraft](https://minecraft.net/) - Mojang Studios - Map - [exaroton](https://exaroton.com/) Team - Mod Loader - [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net) ### Building - [Adorn](https://modrinth.com/mod/adorn) - [Chisel Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/chisel-reborn) - [Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric)* - [Factory Blocks Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/factory-blocks) - [Immersive Portals](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveportals)* - [Stoneworks](https://modrinth.com/mod/stoneworks) - [Templates 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/templates-2) - [Yuushya Townscape](https://modrinth.com/mod/yuushya-townscape)* - [Signpost](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/signpost)* ### Performance - [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) - [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) - [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix) - [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) ### Utility - exaroton Gamescom - [Better Command Block UI](https://modrinth.com/mod/bettercommandblockui) - [Controllable](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/controllable-fabric)* - [DCWA](https://modrinth.com/mod/dcwa) - [Gravity Changer](https://modrinth.com/mod/gravity-api-fork) - [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - [Ping Wheel](https://modrinth.com/mod/ping-wheel) - [ReplayMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod) - [Worldedit](https://modrinth.com/plugin/worldedit) - [WorldEditCUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/worldedit-cui) ### Libraries - [Architectury](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) - [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) - [Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port) - [Framework](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framework-fabric) - [Puzzles Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzles-lib) ### Other - [BDStudio](https://eszesbalint.github.io/bdstudio) - [mcstacker.net](https://mcstacker.net/) - [minecraft.wiki](https://minecraft.wiki/) - [misode.github.io](https://misode.github.io/) - [aternos/plop](https://github.com/aternosorg/plop) _\* This mod was modified by us for this modpack. For more information, check the [license](https://gist.github.com/matthi4s/d77cf238e10a9177fc066ddfb145e94e)_
